title: RIZLA REGULAR RED ROLLING PAPER - FULL BOX OF 100 BOOKLETS
features: Red Rizla papers have the same thickness and medium weight as Greens and come minus the pre-cut corner. Super robust and easy to roll, Rizla Red papers fit the bill for rollers of all levels of experience. If you’re familiar with Greens, you’re sure to love the Red Rizla.
FULL NEW SEALED BOX OF 100 BOOKLETS/PACKS
description: Product Description RIZLA RED REGULAR 100 Box Contains Stanadrd Rizla Red
